---
title: Example presentation
format:
  kotlin-quarto-revealjs-theme-revealjs:
    footer: "Creative UNIVERSITY ©"
author:
  - name: Kevin A. Hernández Rostrán
    degrees:
      - M.Sc.
    orcid: 0009-0001-7682-0350
    email: khernandez@example.com/
    affiliation:
      - name: Creative University
        url: https://example.com/
date: last-modified
---

## Introduction

*TODO* Create an example file that demonstrates the formatting and features of your format.

Use list:

- Item A
- Item B

## More Information

You can learn more about controlling the appearance of RevealJS output here: <https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/>

## Code

```{.kotlin filename="main.kt"}
fun main(args: Array<String>) {
    val nombre = args.getOrNull(0)?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() } ?: "Kotlin"
    println("¡Hola, $nombre!")
}
```
